title: internal error: 11vvp_fun_not: recv_real(0.000000) not implemented
body:
Simulation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an error:
```
module a(input real i1);
  not g(w1, i1);
endmodule: a
```

Commands:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv -o a.out
vvp a.out
```

Error output:
```
internal error: 11vvp_fun_not: recv_real(0.000000) not implemented
vvp: vvp_net.cc:3347: virtual void vvp_net_fun_t::recv_real(vvp_net_ptr_t, double, vvp_context_t): Assertion `0' failed.
Aborted
```

Expected behavior:
The module both compiles and simulates successfully

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20221226-572-gb74511974)`

Found by a [verilog model](https://github.com/DepTyCheck/verilog-model) using [deptycheck](https://github.com/buzden/deptycheck)
code_blocks:
internal error: 11vvp_fun_not: recv_real(0.000000) not implemented
vvp: vvp_net.cc:3347: virtual void vvp_net_fun_t::recv_real(vvp_net_ptr_t, double, vvp_context_t): Assertion `0' failed.
Aborted
